concerns.text: T008 (schema-validation utilities) consumes T007 (JSON-Schema files) but lacks [DEPENDS ON: T007]. Producer-consumer violation: validation code cannot run without schema definitions.
T014 (manifest.json generation) depends on T007 (schema files) for contract validation but lacks explicit dependency. Manifest generation requires schema definitions to be present.

T020b (error-message verification), T020c (provenance archiving), and T021 (extractor unit tests) all consume T020 (extraction logic) but lack [DEPENDS ON: T020]. Tests cannot execute before implementation.
T024 (reconstructor unit tests) depends on T023 (statistical reconstruction) but lacks [DEPENDS ON: T023]. Test task cannot run before implementation task.
T026 (validator unit tests) depends on T025 (inconsistency validator) but lacks [DEPENDS ON: T025]. Test task cannot run before implementation task.
T028 (evaluate inconsistency-detection) depends on T027 (synthetic dataset generator) but lacks [DEPENDS ON: T027]. Evaluation cannot run without synthetic data.
T034 (analysis notebook) depends on T025 (validator) for discrepancy justifications but lacks [DEPENDS ON: T025]. Notebook requires validator output.
T046 (CSV summary generator) consumes T042 (prevalence test) and T044 (bias-adjustment) outputs but lacks [DEPENDS ON: T042, T044]. Report generation requires analysis modules.
T047 (report generator unit test) depends on T046 (CSV summary generator) but lacks [DEPENDS ON: T046]. Test cannot run before implementation.
T052 (extend report_generator.py) depends on T046 (CSV summary generator) but lacks [DEPENDS ON: T046]. Extension requires base implementation.
T057-T060 (export validation tasks) depend on T056 (manifest creation) but lack [DEPENDS ON: T056]. Validation cannot run before manifest exists.
T067 (resource monitor unit test) depends on T063 (resource-monitoring module) but lacks [DEPENDS ON: T063]. Test cannot run before implementation.
T039-T041 (contract/integration tests) reference 'run AFTER T020/T023/T018-T032' in descriptions but lack formal [DEPENDS ON:] tags. Use explicit dependency syntax for consistency.
